calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Plaintiff/Respondent Tharathorn Subchairoj appeared, assisted via Zoom by Court certified Thai interpreter Benjawan Terlecky.

Defendant/Appellant Kochapornd Petchavanon appeared, assisted via Zoom by Court certified Thai interpreter Benjawan Terlecky.

Plaintiff/Respondent Tharathorn Subchairoj sworn and testified on his own behalf.
Defendant/Appellant Kochapornd Petchavanon sworn and testified on her own behalf.

The following documentary evidence is introduced and admitted:
Plaintiff/Respondent's Group Exhibit.
Defendant/Appellant's Group Exhibit.

The matter is taken under submission.

All exhibits offered in open court are returned.
Judge: Carol Gold, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (525)
